productName: Raging Goat - RG - Hash Rosin - Solventless Badder - Bubba Kush - 1g
description: Top-shelf indica hash rosin, made by ice-water washing Bubba Kush into bubble hash, then pressing that hash into pure, terpene-drenched oil — two crafts in one jar. A true craft dab, with notes of coffee, earthy, and pungent, delivering a heavy, relaxed body calm.
